text: I find myself enveloped by the orderly geometry of a modern, minimal institution—the sharp lines, cold glass, and metallic fixtures speak of structured curiosity and restrained intellect. Moving into the vibrant 'R+D' space, the energy shifts; colors and carefully curated displays awaken my sense of wonder and discovery. I feel a quiet awe here, a sense of anticipation in this place where ideas are studied, showcased, and made tangible. It is a threshold between contemplation and innovation, and I am invited to linger at the intersection.
